---
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# REGISTRATION FEES
:::

**Note:** Registration fees are **inclusive of 18% GST**.

## Indian Participants

::: fee-table
| Category                                   | Early Bird (INR) | Regular (INR) |
|:-------------------------------------------|:----------------:|:-------------:|
| **Industry Professionals / Executives** |     ₹25,000      |    ₹30,000    |
| **Faculty and Post Docs** |     ₹12,000      |    ₹15,000    |
| **Students & Research Scholars** |      ₹7,000      |    ₹10,000    |
:::

## Foreign Participants

::: fee-table
| Category                                   | Early Bird (USD) | Regular (USD) |
|:-------------------------------------------|:----------------:|:-------------:|
| **Industry Professionals / Executives** |      \$300       |     \$350     |
| **Faculty and Post Docs** |      \$250       |     \$300     |
| **Students & Research Scholars** |      \$150       |     \$200     |
:::
